content.en:
The Ancestor of the Blood Gang Domain told about the origin of the Holy War, and Ye Tian learned about the so-called Holy War.

It turned out that a long time ago, a special world was born in the Dark Sanctuary, which contained a lot of treasures, even holy relics, and some of the treasures were even of great help to the Superior Domain Ancestors.

As a result, a large number of Domain Ancestors started to fight, and even a large number of Supreme Domain Ancestors and Invincible Domain Ancestors fell, and even the Supreme Domain Ancestor level fell several.

In that battle, the Dark Sanctuary suffered heavy losses.

At this time, the Dark Sanctuary ushered in a foreign enemy, and the weakened Dark Sanctuary had suffered a lot of losses, coupled with the enemy's attack.

After that, although the Dark Sanctuary repelled the enemy, it was also devastated for countless years.

Since then, the Ten Holy Gates have been established one by one to manage the order of the Dark Sanctuary, and the mysterious world has been sealed, which is only opened once every countless years, and the competition for the place in the mysterious world is also called the Holy War, which is also to commemorate that battle.

Moreover, in order to ensure that the high-end strength is not lost, the holy war decided to only be conducted at the half-step domain ancestor level.

In the past, the Battle Realm Tower had not yet appeared, so the battle at the half-step domain ancestor level would also cause certain losses, and many geniuses had fallen.

But after the appearance of the War Realm Tower, the Holy War will not be dead, which can greatly reduce the loss of geniuses, but the competition is greater.

Because the geniuses cultivated will not die, the major forces are cultivated at all costs, and they are not afraid of being lost.

So, the jihad is getting more and more intense.

This time, the battle gate belongs to the class of genius fault, and there are not many demonic geniuses born.

Therefore, this session is very unfriendly to the battle gate.

This is also something that can't be helped, after all, it is impossible for any Holy Gate to have demonic geniuses born all the time, and most demonic geniuses are cultivated internally, because the talents of the heirs born of the strong are generally very high.

may not be able to give birth to the kind of genius who is incomparably evil and can enter the top ten of the Guiyi list, then it is impossible to say.

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, if you can enter the top twenty in the Holy War, the Battle Gate will cultivate you at all costs!"

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor spoke.

"Is it just the top twenty?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor said with a smile: "Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor, don't underestimate the top twenty, the top twenty of the Dark Sacred Domain are different from the top twenty of the Unified List, many demonic geniuses will not enter the Battle Realm Tower, especially during this period, the hidden strength of the major Holy Gates is abnormal. Even the top five geniuses don't necessarily make it to the top 20. Your current strength is definitely far from reaching the top 20, so we will focus on cultivating you in the next 500 years, so that your strength can grow rapidly, and maybe you can hope to enter the top 20!"

"I'm going to try to be in the top 20!"

Ye Tian assured.

"Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws, if you have any requests, just mention them. No matter what overly demanded, Wargate will try to accommodate you. However, if you behave very mediocre in the Holy War, you will not meet the requirements of the Battle Gate. Then in the future, the battle gate will reduce the cultivation of you. Therefore, this holy war will determine your future treatment in the war gate. "Blood Gang Domain Ancestral Dao.

"What if I could get first?"

Ye Tian asked with a smile.

"Impossible!" the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor said, "With your talent, even if you cultivate the Eternal Immortal Holy Body to the consummation realm, I'm afraid you won't be able to get the first place." Let me tell you the truth, the geniuses who can participate in the holy war, the top level is almost all the inheritors of the Extreme Dao, and the holy bodies have reached the consummation realm one by one, although those holy bodies are not as good as the eternal immortal holy bodies, but they have mastered more secret arts, and they must have cultivated the domain arts to a very high level. In addition, this holy war may also involve the Holy Endowment, and the other party has mastered the Holy Technique, which is not an existence that you can compete with at all!"

"I mean what if!"

Ye Tian said again.

"What if?" the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor was silent for a moment, and said, "If you get the first place, the Battle Gate will list you as the first holy son, and directly give you a holy relic, and many inheritances are all open to you, how about it?"

"Holy Relic!"

Ye Tian became short of breath.

How valuable a holy relic is, such as the War Boundary Tower, is a holy relic.

Of course, the holy relics given by the Battle Gate are certainly far inferior to the Battle Realm Tower, but as long as they are holy relics, their value is unimaginable.

"Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, then I'll strive to get the first place!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor shook his head and stopped talking, he thought that Ye Tian was too confident, he didn't understand the power of those demons in the Dark Sacred Domain at all, and he didn't know the power of the Holy Endowment at all.

"Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, you said before that you asked me to mention it, didn't you?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Not bad!"

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor nodded.

Ye Tian pondered for a while, then said, "I need multiple holy skill inheritances, and I also need treasures that can quickly assist me in improving the fusion of the forbidden path and the flesh path, and I need a more advanced eternal immortal holy body auxiliary thing!"

"Multiple Sacred Skill Inheritances?" The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor wondered: "What do you want so many Holy Skill Inheritances for? You have already asked for a Holy Skill Inheritance before, and there is no point in asking for it again! Don't think about teaching it to others, it's useless, you must make a strict oath to obtain the Holy Skill Inheritance, here you know!"

"Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, this is my first request, if I can't get the top twenty of the Holy War, then I don't want any resources in the future!"

Ye Tian hurriedly said.

"This ......" The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor couldn't agree in one go, because Ye Tian asked for multiple holy skill inheritances, not one inheritance.

Although the battle gate said that he had given him a lot of rights, and he could agree to almost all of them if he wanted to go, the request for the inheritance of multiple holy skills was a bit excessive.

If the Holy Technique was of great help to Ye Tian, they might give it directly, but the key was of no use to Ye Tian!

The other side.

The body of the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor was discussing with many high-level leaders of the Battle Gate.

"The Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws said that he wanted to inherit multiple holy skills, as long as he gave it to him, he guaranteed that he could get the top twenty, otherwise he wouldn't have any resources in the future!"

Blood Gang Domain Ancestor said.

"What, multiple holy skill inheritances? does he think the holy skill inheritance is something, Chinese cabbage?"

"I think this request is a bit excessive, it's a waste of the Holy Skill Inheritance!"

"The inheritance of holy skills is very precious to us, if it is such a waste, it will be a pity!"

"Do you think he has the endowment?"

"How can he be a saint endowment, he is just from a small realm, and if he is really the owner of the holy endowment, one holy skill or two holy skills of the same kind is enough, what do you want multiple holy skills for?"

One by one, the high-level leaders of the battle gate quarreled endlessly, and there was no unanimous opinion.

Abrupt.

A voice came.

"Agree to his request, but only if you get the top ten, otherwise there will be no resources to supply in the future!"

Hearing this voice, everyone responded, "Yes!"

The owner of this voice is none other than a Supreme Domain Ancestor of the Battle Gate, one of the thirteen masters of the Battle Gate, and the Fire Pattern War Ancestor of the Battle Gate!
